{{Quote|I find it somewhat humorous that Tavier, for all his hatred of our organization and what in which we believe, has no problem using the very same equipment the Republic devised for its many skirmishes against forces like his army.|Colonel Andrephan Stormcaller, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
'''Andrephan Stormcaller''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Colonel/Legends|officer]].

==Biography==
A light-eyed [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]], Stormcaller was a tactical expert and a veteran of many conflicts. He lied about his age and joined the military at age 15. He served in multiple conflicts and was eventually commissioned by the [[Delephran militia]] to train their commanders and assist with [[Piracy Scouring|eliminating]] [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] along the [[Vexta Belt]]. The [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] absorbed the militia and Stormcaller was forced to serve. He spent three years at the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] before deciding to defect to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="AJ3">{{JournalCite|3|Blasters for Hire}}</ref>

Alongside [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], he was responsible for the development of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]] units used by the Alliance. He also developed the SpecForces [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|Infiltrator]] units, even serving in one of them for a time.

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], while his brown hair was going gray, Stormcaller was a member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. He wrote reports on the [[Guiteica Militia]], explaining that their equipment was far too outdated to be a real threat to the Alliance. He was also surprised that Militia leader [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]], a strong Republic-hater, would use so many Republic-designed machines.<ref name="air" />

During the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Stormcaller became disillusioned because the government did not want to help his native planet after it was taken by the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. He decided to desert his service to the New Republic and create his own mercenary unit, the [[Red Moons]].<ref name="AJ3" />

As the leader of the Red Moons, Stormcaller assigned [[Sully Tigereye]] to command a rescue operation on the children of the ambassador of [[Cantras Gola]], who had been kidnapped by the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]] as a means to blackmail the politician. The mission was successful.<ref name="bog">{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Stormcaller was very loyal and charming. He was a brilliant tactician able to plan and execute a variety of missions.<ref name="AJ3" /> He had a habit of smoking [[Shento cigar]]s.{{fact}}. He had a weathered face, light colored [[Eye/Legends|eye]]s, and graying dark [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="air" />

==Skills and abilities==
Stormcaller was an excellent [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] marksman. He was very knowledgeable in the latest security and detention procedures.<ref name="AJ3" />
